cards.title: Blinded Gunners
cards.effect_text: While attacking, you cannot spend accuracy icons.

cards.title: Comm Noise
cards.effect_text: Your opponent may either reduce your speed by 1 or choose a new command on your top command dial. Then flip this card facedown.

cards.title: Compartment Fire
cards.effect_text: You cannot ready your defense tokens.

cards.title: Crew Panic
cards.effect_text: Before you reveal a command dial, you must either suffer 1 damage or discard that dial. If you discard it, do not reveal a dial this round.

cards.title: Damaged Controls
cards.effect_text: When you overlap a ship or obstacle, deal 1 facedown damage card to your ship (in addition to all other obstacle effects).

cards.title: Injured Crew
cards.effect_text: Choose and discard 1 of your defense tokens. Then flip this card facedown.

cards.title: Life Support Failure
cards.effect_text: Discard all of your command tokens. You cannot have any command tokens.

cards.title: Capacitor Failure
cards.effect_text: If a hull zone has no remaining shields, you cannot recover shields in it nor move shields to it. If that hull zone is defending, you cannot spend Redirect tokens.

cards.title: Coolant Discharge
cards.effect_text: Only one attack you perform each round can target a ship.

cards.title: Damaged Munitions
cards.effect_text: When attacking a ship, before you roll your attack pool, remove 1 die of your choice.

cards.title: Depowered Armament
cards.effect_text: You cannot attack at long range.

cards.title: Disengaged Fire Control
cards.effect_text: When declaring the target of an attack, you cannot choose a target against whom the attack would be obstructed.

cards.title: Faulty Countermeasures
cards.effect_text: You cannot spend exhausted defense tokens.

cards.title: Point-Defense Failure
cards.effect_text: When attacking a squadron, before you roll your attack pool, remove 1 die of your choice.

cards.title: Power Failure
cards.effect_text: Your engineering value is reduced to half its value, rounded down.

cards.title: Projector Misaligned
cards.effect_text: Your hull zone with the most remaining shields loses all of its shields. If multiple hull zones are tied, choose between the tied hull zones. Then flip this card facedown.

cards.title: Ruptured Engine
cards.effect_text: After you execute a maneuver, if the speed on your speed dial is greater than 1, suffer 1 damage.

cards.title: Shield Failure
cards.effect_text: Your opponent may choose up to 2 of your hull zones. Each of the chosen hull zones loses 1 shield. Then flip this card facedown.

cards.title: Structural Damage
cards.effect_text: Deal 1 facedown damage card to your ship. Then flip this card facedown.

cards.title: Targeter Disruption
cards.effect_text: While attacking, you cannot resolve critical effects.

cards.title: Thrust Control Malfunction
cards.effect_text: The yaw value for the last adjustable joint at your current speed is reduced by 1.

cards.title: Thruster Fissure
cards.effect_text: When you change your speed by 1 or more, suffer 1 damage.
